title: Roasted Italian Coriander Orecchiette
description: A roasted Italian dish featuring coriander and orecchiette, perfect for a brunch mood, this ayurvedic sattvic friendly recipe is made with fry grind rice khao khuas and has a glassy jelly texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the orecchiette according to package instructions and set aside.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the ground coriander seeds.
Add the khao khuas to the pan and stir to combine with the coriander and oil.
Add the cooked orecchiette to the pan and stir to combine with the khao khuas mixture.
Transfer the orecchiette mixture to a baking dish and roast in the oven for 15 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and stir in the minced garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the top of the orecchiette and return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the roasted Italian coriander orecchiette hot and enjoy.
